en: Brothers, my heart's desire and prayer to God for them is that they may be saved.
zh: 弟兄們，我心裡切切盼望的，並且為以色列人向 神祈求的，是要他們得救。

en: I bear them witness that they have a zeal for God, but not according to knowledge.
zh: 我可以為他們作證，他們對 神有熱心，但不是按著真見識；

en: For, being ignorant of the righteousness that comes from God, and seeking to establish their own, they did not submit to God's righteousness.
zh: 他們既然不明白 神的義，而又企圖建立自己的義，就不服 神的義了。

en: For Christ is the end of the law for righteousness to everyone who believes.
zh: 因為律法的終極就是基督，使所有信的人都得著義。

en: For Moses writes about the righteousness that is based on the law, that the person who does the commandments shall live by them.
zh: 論到出於律法的義，摩西寫著說：“遵行這些事的人就必因這些事而活。”

en: But the righteousness based on faith says, "Do not say in your heart, 'Who will ascend into heaven?'"(that is, to bring Christ down)
zh: 但那出於信心的義卻這樣說：“你心裡不要說：‘誰要升到天上去呢？’

en: or "'Who will descend into the abyss?'"(that is, to bring Christ up from the dead).
zh: 或是說：‘誰要下到深淵去呢？’ ”

en: But what does it say? "The word is near you, in your mouth and in your heart" (that is, the word of faith that we proclaim);
zh: 然而那出於信心的義還說甚麼呢？ “這話與你相近， 在你口裡，也在你心裡。” 這話就是我們所傳信心的信息。

en: because, if you confess with your mouth that Jesus is Lord and believe in your heart that God raised him from the dead, you will be saved.
zh: 你若口裡認耶穌為主，心裡信 神使他從死人中復活，就必得救；

en: For with the heart one believes and is justified, and with the mouth one confesses and is saved.
zh: 因為心裡相信就必稱義，用口承認就必得救。

en: For the Scripture says, "Everyone who believes in him will not be put to shame."
zh: 經上說：“所有信靠他的人，必不致失望。”

en: For there is no distinction between Jew and Greek; the same Lord is Lord of all, bestowing his riches on all who call on him.
zh: 其實並不分猶太人和希臘人，因為大家同有一位主；他厚待所有求告他的人，

en: For "everyone who calls on the name of the Lord will be saved."
zh: 因為“凡求告主名的，都必得救。”

en: But how are they to call on him in whom they have not believed? And how are they to believe in him of whom they have never heard? And how are they to hear without someone preaching?
zh: 然而，人還沒有信他，怎能求告他呢？沒有聽見他，怎能信他呢？沒有人傳揚，怎能聽見呢？

en: And how are they to preach unless they are sent? As it is written, "How beautiful are the feet of those who preach the good news!"
zh: 如果沒有蒙差遣，怎能傳揚呢？如經上所記：“那些傳美事報喜訊的人，他們的腳蹤多麼美！”

en: But they have not all obeyed the gospel. For Isaiah says, "Lord, who has believed what he has heard from us?"
zh: 但並不是所有的人都順從福音，因為以賽亞說：“主啊，我們所傳的，有誰信呢？”

en: So faith comes from hearing, and hearing through the word of Christ.
zh: 可見信心是從所聽的道來的，所聽的道是藉著基督的話來的。

en: But I ask, have they not heard? Indeed they have, for "Their voice has gone out to all the earth, and their words to the ends of the world."
zh: 但是我要說，他們沒有聽見嗎？他們的確聽見了，如經上所記： “他們的聲音傳遍全地， 他們的言語傳到地極。”

en: But I ask, did Israel not understand? First Moses says, "I will make you jealous of those who are not a nation; with a foolish nation I will make you angry."
zh: 我再說：以色列人真的不明白嗎？首先，摩西說： “我要使你們對那不是子民的生嫉妒， 對那無知的民族起忿怒。”

en: Then Isaiah is so bold as to say, "I have been found by those who did not seek me; I have shown myself to those who did not ask for me."
zh: 後來，以賽亞也放膽地說： “沒有尋找我的，我讓他們找到； 沒有求問我的，我向他們顯現。”

en: But of Israel he says, "All day long I have held out my hands to a disobedient and contrary people."
zh: 論到以色列人，他卻說： “我整天向那悖逆頂嘴的子民伸開雙手。”
